name: Grilled Corn-in-The-Husks with Chipotle Butter (Mandel)
recipeIngredient: 1 canned chipotle chile-in-adobo, or more, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Pull the husks back from the corn without tearing it and remove the silk.
2. Puree the chipotle chiles in a blender or mini-food processor.
3. Heat the butter over low heat, then add the chipotle puree, minced garlic, ground cumin, and salt. Stir until the butter melts and the mixture is fragrant, about 5 minutes.
4. Brush the melted butter onto the corn. Pull the husks back over the ears of corn, tying with a string if necessary to hold them in place (do not use too much pressure).
5. Grill the corn over hot coals, turning as needed until it is tender and lightly charred on all sides, about 12 minutes.
[8 servings. Each serving: 154 calories; 271 mg sodium; 23 mg cholesterol; 10 grams fat; 17 grams carbohydrates; 3 grams protein; 0.64 gram fiber.]
